nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks

nodes.label: Task clarity for AI use

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: Time wasted due to AI inaccuracies or back-and-forth

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner vs delegator

nodes.label: AI task scope manageability

nodes.grounding_span: being told something had been done when it hadn't

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
